name: Vegetable Dahl Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the split peas in hot water for 1 hour, then drain.
2. Wash the Mung beans well and remove any loose stones or sticks.
3. Combine rice, legumes, ghee, turmeric, asafetida, chili, ginger root, vegetables, and stock in a large pot.
4. Cook for about one hour until tender.
5. Blend the vegetables at high speed to make a very creamy and smooth soup, then return to the pot.
6. Sprinkle in the ground coriander, cumin, and garam masala. Heat until almost boiling and simmer gently for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring to prevent burning.
7. Add black pepper, salt, and minced coriander, then serve.
